spec.precondition: requires valid(nd) && valid_range(nd->attached_processes, 0, 16) && (forall i, 0 <= i < 16 ==> valid(nd->attached_processes[i])) && (the process calling this function is a valid running task with a non-zero pid)
spec.postcondition: (ensures result == true ==> (exists slot, 0 <= slot < 16 && nd->attached_processes[slot].pid == task_tgid_nr(current) && nd->attached_processes[slot].open_count >= 1) && ensures result == false ==> (forall i, 0 <= i < 16 ==> nd->attached_processes[i].pid != 0) && ensures result == true || result == false) && ((npid_find_process_slot(nd) != -1) ? (nd->attached_processes[npid_find_process_slot(nd)].open_count > 0 && result == true) : (result == (exists i in [0,16): nd->attached_processes[i].pid == 0)))

npid_find_process_slot.postcondition: (result < 0) || ((ensures (result == -1) || (result >= 0 && result < 16 && in_bounds(nd->attached_processes, result) && nd->attached_processes[result].pid == task_tgid_nr(get_current()) && nd->attached_processes[result].open_count > 0 && valid_range(nd->attached_processes[result].memory_used, 0, 2))) && (result == -1 ? (forall i in [0,16): nd->attached_processes[i].pid != task_tgid_nr(get_current())) : (result >= 0 && result < 16 && nd->attached_processes[result].pid == task_tgid_nr(get_current()) && (forall j in [0, result): nd->attached_processes[j].pid != task_tgid_nr(get_current())))))
